scenario_fact.title: Current Conditions
scenario_fact.what_it_tests: Shows current value, acreage, constraints, and data confidence before scenario assumptions.

scenario_fact.title: Growth Continues As-Is
scenario_fact.what_it_tests: Tests whether current observed permit pressure reinforces existing fiscal/service tradeoffs.

scenario_fact.title: Infrastructure-Constrained Growth
scenario_fact.what_it_tests: Tests where tax-base opportunity may be limited by utility, school, floodplain, or transportation burden.

scenario_fact.title: Targeted Investment Scenario
scenario_fact.what_it_tests: Tests whether infrastructure investment could unlock future value in underbuilt or corridor parcels.

scenario_fact.title: Higher-Density Redevelopment Scenario
scenario_fact.what_it_tests: Tests modeled tax-base lift against public cost risk under redevelopment assumptions.

scenario_fact.title: Employment / Industrial Scenario
scenario_fact.what_it_tests: Tests employment land opportunity against road access, flood exposure, and service readiness.

scenario_fact.title: Mixed-Use Corridor Scenario
scenario_fact.what_it_tests: Tests corridor investment readiness and market + planning alignment.
